payload.label: clock
payload.long_description: Close-up of a round white clock face with black Roman numerals and black hands set in a reflective scalloped/fluted metal bezel; the bottom edge of the clock is cropped by the image, there is specular glare on the metal, and the view appears close (approx. 0.6 m from camera).

message.content: {"label":"clock","short_description":"white clock with scalloped bezel","long_description":"Close-up of a round white clock face with black Roman numerals and black hands set in a reflective scalloped/fluted metal bezel; the bottom edge of the clock is cropped by the image, there is specular glare on the metal, and the view appears close (approx. 0.6 m from camera).","attributes":["white dial","black Roman numerals","black hands","scalloped/fluted metal bezel","reflective/ shiny surface","glare/specular highlight","bottom edge cropped","close-up view"],"distance_from_camera_m":0.6}
